name: Moroccan Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain excess liquid from the grated cucumbers.
2. Combine with sugar, vinegar, olive oil, and salt.
3. Crush za'atar between fingertips and sprinkle over cucumbers.
4. Mix well with two forks.
5. Chill in refrigerator.
6. Decorate with olives before serving. (An herb found only in the Mediterranean, similar to marjoram which may be substituted for it. Or use thyme or oregano or a mixture of all three.)
